text: PWA version ready! You can now install this app on your phone. Look for the install prompt or use browser menu > Add to Home Screen.
This message was sent by editing the messages.json file! If you see this, the file watching is working. 🎉

Browser notifications added! 🔔 Tap the bell icon in the header to enable them. When the app is in the background, you'll get a notification when I send a message. (We can still keep Pushover as backup for when the app is fully closed)
